name: mtbuddy_run_workspace
description: Run the deterministic MTBUDDY workspace task and generate report, action CSV, and audit artifacts.

workspace.description: Absolute or relative path to the allowed MTBUDDY workspace.

name: mtbuddy_list_files
description: List allowed .md, .txt, and .csv files in a MTBUDDY workspace, excluding generated artifacts.

workspace.description: Absolute or relative path to the allowed MTBUDDY workspace.

description: Read one allowed file from a MTBUDDY workspace by relative path.

workspace.description: Absolute or relative path to the allowed MTBUDDY workspace.

name: mtbuddy_generate_report
description: Generate a Markdown workspace report artifact from allowed local files.

workspace.description: Absolute or relative path to the allowed MTBUDDY workspace.

name: mtbuddy_write_action_csv
description: Generate an action-items CSV artifact from allowed local files in a MTBUDDY workspace.

workspace.description: Absolute or relative path to the allowed MTBUDDY workspace.
